Renoworks Announces Annual and Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results

data.title: The Winn-Dixie Company celebrates Earth Day by advancing sustainable innovation and local impact
data.description: In Jacksonville, Florida, the Winn-Dixie Company is marking Earth Day with a focus on sustainable innovation and community impact. The company is emphasizing efforts to promote environmental sustainability and support local initiatives on this occasion.

data.title: Performance Food Group Company to Host Webcast of Third-Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results
data.description: Performance Food Group Company, located in Richmond, Virginia, has announced that they will host a webcast of their third-quarter fiscal 2026 results. This event will provide investors and stakeholders with important information regarding the company's performance during this period. The webcast is a significant opportunity for individuals to gain insights into the company's financial status and strategic direction. The specific date and time of the webcast have not been provided in the information given. This news signifies the company's commitment to transparency and communication with its investors.

data.title: Two-Thirds of Small Businesses Expect Positive Boost from FIFA World Cup™, But Many Aren’t Ready
data.description: According to recent research, approximately 64% of individuals anticipate a favorable outcome from the upcoming FIFA World Cup™. However, not everyone feels adequately prepared to take advantage of this opportunity.

data.title: Brightstar Capital Partners Invests in Bendon, a Provider of Screen-Free Children’s Activity Products
data.description: In a recent development, Brightstar Capital Partners, a private equity firm, has successfully completed the acquisition of Bendon Publishing International, Inc. This company specializes in creating and distributing licensed children’s coloring, activity, and educational products. Ben Ferguson, the Founder and CEO of Bendon, will remain in his current role following the acquisition. The acquisition marks an important milestone for Brightstar as they continue to focus on partnering with entrepreneurs and management teams. The deal solidifies Bendon’s position in the market and ensures continuity with key members of the management team.

data.title: Philip Morris International Reports 2026 First-Quarter Results and Updates 2026 Full-Year Adjusted Diluted EPS Forecast for Currency Only;
data.description: In Stamford, CT, Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE: PM) released its 2026 first quarter results. CEO Jacek Olczak stated that the company's performance surpassed expectations thanks to the success of IQOS, leading to substantial growth against previous year figures. The international smoke-free sector showed strong momentum, contributing to a 16% increase in adjusted diluted EPS in Q1.

data.title: Precision BioSciences Announces Late-Breaking Poster Presentation for PBGENE-HBV at European Association for the Study of the Liver Congress 2026
data.description: Durham-based Precision BioSciences, Inc., listed on Nasdaq as DTIL, will share new clinical biopsy data from the Phase 1 ELIMINATE-B trial at the EASL Congress 2026. The company, specializing in gene editing, uses the ARCUS® platform for developing in vivo gene editing therapies for diseases with high unmet needs. The trial in focus, PBGEN, aims to address these needs and will present its latest findings in a late-breaking poster session.

data.title: Colorado Quantum Incubator to Launch the Nation's First Open-Access Quantum Timing Testbed
data.description: A new testbed has been launched by the Colorado Quantum Incubator in Boulder, Colorado. This initiative marks the nation's first dedicated platform to validate quantum timing technologies. These technologies are essential for ensuring the accuracy and security of digital transactions and infrastructure. This development showcases the growing importance of quantum technology in the digital realm.

data.title: TIC Solutions Confirms Date for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release
data.description: A prominent provider of Testing, Inspection, Certification, and Compliance (TICC) services, TIC Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: TIC), based in Hollywood, Florida, will be unveiling its first quarter financial results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. The company plans to make this information public before the market opens. Furthermore, TIC Solutions will conduct a webcast and conference call to delve into the specifics of these financial results.

data.title: Online Grocery Sales Power Omnichannel Growth as Market Poised to Reach $452 Billion by 2028
data.description: A recent report by FMI–The Food Industry Association and NielsenIQ revealed a shift in grocery shopping dynamics, with consumers now seamlessly combining in-store and online shopping experiences. According to the report titled "Digital Engagement Transforms Grocery Shopping 2026," the traditional choice between physical stores and online platforms is evolving. Omnichannel behaviors are becoming the standard, leading to a projected total of $452 billion in online grocery sales in the U.S. by 2028. This indicates that ecommerce will play a crucial role in driving growth and innovation within the grocery sector.

data.title: CDW to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on May 6
data.description: Vernon Hills-based CDW Corporation (Nasdaq: CDW) will hold a webcast conference call on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, at 7:30 a.m. CT/8:30 a.m. ET to discuss its first quarter results. The call can be accessed live on investor.CDW.com and will include audio with slides. Prior to the call, the press release and presentation slides will be available on the website. Interested individuals are advised to visit the site at least fifteen minutes before the call to register and participate.

data.title: Sam’s Club Launches Enhanced Express Delivery, Fueling Continued eCommerce Growth with Checkout to Doorstep Delivery in as Soon as an Hour – Often Less
data.description: Sam’s Club, a renowned membership retail club based in Bentonville, Arkansas, has introduced an upgraded level to its widely used Express delivery service. This enhancement allows members to receive thousands of in-club items within just an hour, often even quicker, from the moment they checkout to the doorstep delivery. The service comes with no minimum purchase requirement and maintains the same prices as those in the physical club. Greg Pulsifer, the Senior Vice President of Sam’s Club, expressed that while members appreciate the current three hours or less Express delivery, they requested a faster alternative, leading to the launch of this new service tier.

data.title: MOPOP Announces Rebels + Icons: The Photography of Janette Beckman
data.description: In Seattle, the Museum of Pop Culture (MOPOP) has revealed the upcoming exhibition "Rebels + Icons: The Photography of Janette Beckman." Scheduled to run from May 15, 2026, to September 8, 2027, this showcase will present a comprehensive collection of Beckman's photography, with a staggering 700 photographs from over four decades. The exhibit will include a range of pieces from rare archival prints to modern collaborations and recently discovered images. "Rebels + Icons" provides a unique opportunity to delve into the visual narrative crafted by Beckman over the years.

data.title: Veristat to Acquire Certara’s Regulatory and Medical Writing Business
data.description: Veristat, a science-focused full-service CRO and consultancy based in Southborough, Massachusetts, has revealed its plan to acquire Certara's Regulatory and Medical Writing business. This acquisition aims to bolster Veristat's capabilities in advancing intricate therapies through the drug development process up to regulatory submission. The team from Certara known for providing specialized advisory services and skilled in crafting various clinical and non-clinical documents will become part of Veristat. This strategic move underscores Veristat's commitment to enhancing its services with the inclusion of a highly regarded team.

data.title: Ecolab Unleashes Water Intelligence to Drive Growth in the AI Era
data.description: In St. Paul, Minnesota, businesses are adapting to a rapidly changing landscape as artificial intelligence continues to drive growth. The demand for water, a crucial resource, is escalating with water access being essential for approximately 60% of the global GDP. By 2030, a 56% freshwater shortfall is projected worldwide. Water access is becoming increasingly vital for businesses to achieve optimal performance and growth. Ecolab, a renowned global water leader with over a century of experience, is at the forefront of addressing these challenges.

data.title: Best Buy Announces Chief Executive Officer Succession Plans
data.description: In Minneapolis, Best Buy Co., Inc. (NYSE: BBY) has revealed that Jason Bonfig, the current Chief Customer, Product and Fulfillment Officer, will replace Corie Barry as the new Chief Executive Officer. Barry will resign from her positions as CEO and Board member by the end of Q3 on October 31. Bonfig will assume the role of CEO and also become a member of the Board. This transition marks Bonfig as the sixth CEO in Best Buy's 60-year history.

data.title: Middleby to Host Investor Day on May 12, 2026, Ahead of Business Separation
data.description: Elgin, Illinois - The Middleby Corporation (NASDAQ: MIDD) revealed plans to host an Investor Day on May 12, 2026, in New York City. This event signifies a significant juncture in the company’s evolution as it gears up to split into two separate, publicly traded entities in Q2 of 2026. The leadership teams of both The Middleby Corporation and Middleby Food Processing will convene to outline their individual strategic objectives, competitive strengths, and financial outlooks during the event.
